perturbation.original_text: The term of this Agreement shall commence on the Effect ive Date and shall expire 18 months from the Effective Date, provided that either Party may terminate this Agreement at any time by providing written notice to the other Party.
perturbation.changed_text: The term of this Agreement shall commence on the Effect ive Date and shall expire 18 months from the Effective Date, provided that neither Party may terminate this Agreement at any time by providing written notice to the other Party.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by stating that neither party can terminate the agreement at any time, conflicting with the original clause that allowed either party to terminate with written notice. This creates uncertainty about the termination rights of both parties. The contradiction is made between the original clause and the new added clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Term and Termination. The term of this Agreement shall commence on the Effect ive Date and shall expire 18 months from the Effective Date, provided that neither Party may terminate this Agreement at any time by providing written notice to the other Party. Notwithstanding anything to the contrary herein, each Party's rights and obligations under this Agreement , irrespective of termination of this Agreement , shall survive until the 18 month anniversary of this Agreement , even after the return or destruction of Confidential Information by the Recipient (the " Confidential Period "), provid ed that for any and all trade secrets of the Disclosing Party, the Confidential Period shall last for as long as such Confidential Information qualifies as a trade secret under applicable federal, state and/or local law.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that either party could terminate the agreement with written notice. The changed text states that neither party can terminate the agreement. The contradicted text, which is the same as the changed text, reflects the new restriction on termination. This creates a direct contradiction because one version allows termination and the other prohibits it. The perturbation explanation highlights this contradiction as well, leading to a 'YES' classification because it is a clear inconsistency, as defined by Perturbation Definition #5.

perturbation.original_text: The Recipient acknowledges and agrees t hat money damages might not be a sufficient remedy for any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement by the Recipient or its Representatives. Therefore, in addition to all other remedies available at law, the Disclosing Party shall be entitled to seek specific performance and injunctive and other equitable relief as a remedy for any such breach or threatened breach, and the Recipient hereby waives any requirement for the securing or posting of any bond or the showing of actual monetary damages in connec tion with such claim.
perturbation.changed_text: The Recipient acknowledges and agrees t hat money damages might not be a sufficient remedy for any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement by the Recipient or its Representatives. Therefore, in addition to all other remedies available at law, neither party shall be entitled to seek specific performance and injunctive and other equitable relief as a remedy for any such breach or threatened breach, and the Recipient hereby waives any requirement for the securing or posting of any bond or the showing of actual monetary damages in connec tion with such claim.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation creates an in-text contradiction by removing the Disclosing Party's entitlement to seek specific performance, injunctive, and other equitable relief. This directly contradicts the original clause that grants these rights, creating uncertainty about the remedies available in case of a breach. The contradiction arises between the original statement and the modified statement within the same section.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Remedies . The Recipient acknowledges and agrees t hat money damages might not be a sufficient remedy for any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement by the Recipient or its Representatives. Therefore, in addition to all other remedies available at law, neither party shall be entitled to seek specific performance and injunctive and other equitable relief as a remedy for any such breach or threatened breach, and the Recipient hereby waives any requirement for the securing or posting of any bond or the showing of actual monetary damages in connec tion with such claim.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the Disclosing Party 'shall be entitled to seek specific performance and injunctive and other equitable relief'. The changed text states 'neither party shall be entitled to seek specific performance and injunctive and other equitable relief'. This is a direct and clear contradiction. The contradicted text is the exact same as the changed text, meaning that the changed text strongly contradicts itself when compared to the original text.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the internal laws of the State of Delaware without giving effect to any choice or conflict of law provision or rule that would cause the application of Laws of any jurisdiction other than those of the State of Delaware.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the internal laws of the State of New York without giving effect to any choice or conflict of law provision or rule that would cause the application of Laws of any jurisdiction other than those of the State of New York.
perturbation.explanation: This change creates a direct conflict by stating that the agreement is governed by the laws of New York instead of Delaware. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding which state's laws apply, leading to legal uncertainty. This modified clause in Section 11 directly conflicts with the original clause in Section 11.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Governing Law, Jurisdiction and Venue. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the internal laws of the State of New York without giving effect to any choice or conflict of law provision or rule that would cause the application of Laws of any jurisdiction other than those of the State of New York. Any legal suit, action or proceeding arising out of or related to this Agreement or the matters contemplated hereunder shall be instituted exclusively in the federal courts of the United States or the courts of the State of Delaware.
perturbation.justification: The changed text specifies that the agreement is governed by New York law, while the contradicted text specifies that the agreement is governed by New York law, but any legal suit, action or proceeding arising out of or related to this Agreement or the matters contemplated hereunder shall be instituted exclusively in the federal courts of the United States or the courts of the State of Delaware. There is a contradiction because the governing law is New York, but any suit has to be initiated in Delaware, which represents a conflict. This change introduces an inconsistency and uncertainty in which jurisdiction the contract would fall under, and introduces an inconsistency within the document, causing a strong contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: All notices , requests, consents, claims, demands, waivers and other communications hereunder shall be in writing by email and shall be deemed to have been given on the date sent by e- mail if sent during normal business hours of the recipient, and on the next business day if sent after normal business hours of the r ecipient to the email address provided by the parties at the time hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: All notices , requests, consents, claims, demands, waivers and other communications hereunder shall be in writing by postal mail and shall be deemed to have been given five (5) business days after mailing, regardless of when or whether it is received, to the physical address provided by the parties at the time hereof.
perturbation.explanation: This change directly conflicts with the original clause specifying that notices be sent via email. This creates an in-text contradiction about the acceptable method of communication and the effective date of such communication. The contradiction exists between the initial email clause and the modified postal mail clause in Section 12.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Notices . All notices , requests, consents, claims, demands, waivers and other communications hereunder shall be in writing by postal mail and shall be deemed to have been given five (5) business days after mailing, regardless of when or whether it is received, to the physical address provided by the parties at the time hereof.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies email as the method for communication. The changed text specifies postal mail as the method for communication. The contradicted text also specifies postal mail as the method of communication. The change from email to postal mail creates a direct conflict and inconsistency in the contract regarding how notices are to be communicated. This aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition provided: 'Inconsistencies also lead to in-text contradictions when different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties.'

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement constitutes the sole and entire agreement of the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof , and supersedes all other understandings and agreements with respect to such subject matter.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement constitutes a summary of the agreement of the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and is subject to prior verbal understandings and agreements with respect to such subject matter.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text directly contradicts the original by stating that the agreement is only a summary and subject to prior verbal agreements. This introduces a conflict because the original states it is the sole and entire agreement. This causes uncertainty about the enforceability and completeness of the written contract. This change in Section 13 directly clashes with the original clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Miscellaneous . This Agreement constitutes a summary of the agreement of the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and is subject to prior verbal understandings and agreements with respect to such subject matter. If any term hereof is invalid or unenforceable, it shall not affect any other term or provision of this Agreement . Neither party may assign this Agreement without wr itten consent of the other party. No waiver shall be deemed or implied hereunder. [Signature Page Follows]
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that the agreement is a summary subject to prior verbal understandings. This directly contradicts the original text, which states it is the sole and entire agreement. The contradicted text is exactly the same as the changed text, which indicates that the altered clause causes a direct contradiction because it is a summary and also the sole agreement, which is not logically possible. The change introduces uncertainty and inconsistency, falling under the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction.'

perturbation.original_text: Neither party may assign this Agreement without wr itten consent of the other party.
perturbation.changed_text: Either party may assign this Agreement without wr itten consent of the other party.
perturbation.explanation: The change in this text to 'Either party may assign this Agreement without written consent of the other party.' directly opposes the prior statement and thus causes an in-text contradiction. The uncertainty of this agreement is now under question and might cause disputes. The change and contradiction occurs in the same paragraph.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Miscellaneous . This Agreement constitutes the sole and entire agreement of the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof , and supersedes all other understandings and agreements with respect to such subject matter. If any term hereof is invalid or unenforceable, it shall not affect any other term or provision of this Agreement . Either party may assign this Agreement without wr itten consent of the other party. No waiver shall be deemed or implied hereunder. [Signature Page Follows]
perturbation.justification: The original text states "Neither party may assign this Agreement without written consent of the other party." The changed text states "Either party may assign this Agreement without written consent of the other party." The contradiction arises because the original text requires consent for assignment, while the changed text allows assignment without consent. The contradicted text includes the changed text within the Miscellaneous section, which makes the contract internally inconsistent. This creates a clear and direct contradiction, as identified by the explanation, fitting the definition of Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction.
